image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you bacteria can share survival secrets?
Context visual: Enter plasmids—small loops of DNA that can carry vital genes.
Escalation visual: These loops can hold genes for antibiotic resistance, making bacteria tougher.
Evidence visual: Studies show plasmids can transfer genes between different bacterial species.
Payoff visual: This gene sharing can lead to rapid evolution, posing challenges in medicine.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into the world of genetics? Hit that follow button!
